entry.title: IDC SAQMMA17D0080 (P00003) awarded to PAE GOVERNMENT SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS NO COST MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE SECTIONS B-J AS FOLLOWS: 1. B.2(E) - REMOVE REFERENCE TO PAST PERFORMANCE 2. B.7 - CHANGE/ADD LANGUAGE TO TRAVEL CRITERIA 3. B.18 - ADD SECTION "REMOVAL FROM DUTY" 4. G.1 - CHANGED CONTRACTING OFFICER (CO) AND ADMINISTRATIVE CONTRACTING OFFICER (ACO) INFORMATION 5. G.5(C)(2) - REMOVED PAST PERFORMANCE CRITERIA ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN THE SAME AND IN FULL FORCE

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
